modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to install audio/video equipment in classroom or conference room

full_description_text:  
So, during the call, the user asked how to get new tech for their classroom. They mentioned that they need audio and video equipment installed, and that the stuff is already ordered and just sitting with Academic Technology. Oh, and they really want a remote to mute and unmute the mic too!
short_description: Request to install audio/video equipment in classroom or conference room
description: So, during the call, the user asked how to get new tech for their classroom. They mentioned that they need audio and video equipment installed, and that the stuff is already ordered and just sitting with Academic Technology. Oh, and they really want a remote to mute and unmute the mic too!
